name: summarization
description: Summarization tasks — tests semantic matching on paraphrased task descriptions
prompts: Summarize the water cycle in 2-3 sentences.
Briefly explain the water cycle.
Describe the water cycle concisely.
What are the main steps of photosynthesis?
Explain photosynthesis briefly.
Summarize photosynthesis in simple terms.
What is the Turing test and why does it matter?
Briefly describe the Turing test.
Summarize what the Turing test is.
Explain blockchain technology in simple terms.
What is blockchain? Keep it brief.
Give me a short summary of how blockchain works.
What is the greenhouse effect?
Briefly explain the greenhouse effect.
Summarize the greenhouse effect in 2 sentences.
What is the difference between RAM and storage?
Briefly explain RAM vs storage.
Summarize the difference between RAM and hard drive storage.
What is DNS and how does it work?
Explain DNS briefly.
What does DNS do? Keep the answer short.
What is an API and why is it useful?
Briefly explain what an API is.
Summarize what APIs do in software development.
